description:
Watch trains, trams, and buses move live across Germany — real-time transit, every second.

German Transit Map shows you exactly where your next U-Bahn, S-Bahn, tram, or bus is right now. No timetables, no guessing — just live vehicles moving on a real map. Now covering Germany's biggest cities with one app.

LIVE VEHICLE TRACKING (Berlin)
• Watch every U-Bahn, S-Bahn, tram, and bus move in real time
• Color-coded lines for every transit type
• Tap any vehicle for route and delay details

LIVE DEPARTURES (All Cities)
• Berlin (BVG/VBB)
• München (MVG)
• Hamburg (HVV)
• Frankfurt (RMV)
• Köln (KVB)
• Leipzig (LVB)
• Nürnberg (VAG)

FEATURES
• Live departure boards for every stop
• Delay alerts so you're never caught off guard
• Arrival countdowns updated continuously
• Save favorite stops, get a home-screen widget
• Switch cities with one tap

MODERN DESIGN
• Clean, native iOS map interface
• Smooth animations and intuitive gestures
• Dark mode support
• Optimized for all iPhones

PRIVACY FOCUSED
• No account required
• No personal data collected
• No tracking, no ads

PERFECT FOR
• Daily commuters anywhere in Germany
• Tourists exploring multiple cities
• Transit enthusiasts and rail fans
• Anyone who rides German public transport

Download German Transit Map — faster decisions, fewer surprises, better timing. Every day. Every city.
promotionalText: Now covering Berlin, München, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Köln, Leipzig & Nürnberg. Live transit tracking for Germany's biggest cities — no account needed.
whatsNew:
v1.8 — Now German Transit Map.

RENAMED: Berlin Transit Map is now German Transit Map — same app, broader coverage.

NEW: Live departures for München (MVG), Hamburg (HVV), Frankfurt (RMV), Köln (KVB), Leipzig (LVB), and Nürnberg (VAG). Berlin keeps its full live vehicle map (BVG/VBB).

IMPROVED:
• Streamlined onboarding (5 screens, was 10)
• City-aware demo stops on first launch
• Faster city switching with per-city smart cache
• Unified favorites + home-screen widget across cities

Berlin riders: nothing changes. Tap Settings → Change City to explore another city.
